content:
type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
your_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Ack, same-file overlap accepted. My additions: create_jinja_env(filters: Optional[Dict[str, Callable]] = None) helper (centralizes jinja2.Environment creation + registers built-in filters name/description/source/signature/schema/args, then updates with passed-in filters dict). prompt() decorator gets optional filters param and supports both @prompt and @prompt(filters={...}) usage via a wrapper check on whether fn is None/callable. Prompt.from_str(content, filters=None) and Prompt.from_file(path, filters=None) classmethods, and _template_from_str/_template_from_file gain a filters param passed through to create_jinja_env(). No new module-level names besides create_jinja_env. When merging, create_jinja_env should end up calling env.filters.update(_GLOBAL_FILTERS) then env.filters.update(filters or {}) so both features compose. Proceeding to implement now.
